referential_task.1.player.chat_transcrip: [14:18:37] director: First basket looks like a bunny facing to the right  [14:18:43] matcher: For basket #1, I see two bunny-like ones: one is a side-profile bunny facing right (with a red eye), and another is a front-facing bunny face. Is yours the side-profile/lidded one facing right?  [14:18:57] director: side profile one!  [14:19:03] matcher: Got it—placing the side-profile bunny facing right into position 1. Just to confirm: it’s the closed/lidded bunny-body shape (not the flat front-facing bunny face), right?  [14:19:24] director: Correct! Awesome  [14:19:31] matcher: Great—position 1 is the side-profile bunny. Can you describe basket #2 (shape, handle, and any distinctive pattern/colors)?  [14:20:32] director: The second basket is a circle, a little over half volume with thicker wood/rattan rim and a thicker handle, it's a medium brown color  [14:20:39] matcher: I think I found it for position 2: a round, half-bowl basket with a thick rim and a thick arched handle. Before I lock it in— is the handle noticeably darker/black than the body, or roughly the same medium-brown as the basket?  [14:21:03] director: Slightly darker in the picture as if it's in a shadow  [14:21:10] matcher: Placing the round half-bowl basket with the thick rim and thick arched handle into position 2. To confirm: the handle is medium-brown (just slightly darker from shadow), not the very dark/black handle one—right? If yes, please describe basket #3.  [14:21:21] director: Right!  [14:21:26] matcher: Confirmed position 2. Can you describe basket #3—shape, handle style, and any distinctive colors/patterns?  [14:22:08] director: The 3rd basket is an old fashioned style picnic basket with both of the top coverings opening like a standard picnic basket  [14:22:13] matcher: For position 3, I think it’s the classic picnic basket with a center handle and two lids that meet in the middle (both sides open). Is it that one, not the rectangular lidded trunk/hamper?  [14:22:21] director: Yes!  [14:22:28] matcher: Great—positions 1–3 are set. Can you describe basket #4 (shape, handles/lid, and any standout pattern or color)?  [14:23:25] director: The 4th basket is two tones, a lighter brown bottom, a beige upper portion and then a medium brown rim. It has a high, thin handle that meets in the center of both sides.  [14:23:31] matcher: I think I found basket #4: the two-tone one with a beige middle band, darker rim, and a tall thin handle that attaches at the center on both sides. Does it have those little wrap/strap points where the handle connects?  [14:23:40] director: Yes!  [14:23:47] matcher: Placing the two-tone basket with the beige center band and tall thin handle into position 4. Just to confirm: it’s the one with a beige middle stripe and darker brown top/bottom (not the white wicker with leather straps), right? Describe basket #5 next.  [14:24:23] director: 5th basket is oval and not that deep in two-tone medium brown shades, the handle looks twisted or braided  [14:24:30] matcher: For basket #5, I think it’s the shallow oval “tray” basket with the braided/twisted-looking handle. Can you confirm: is it really flat with a visible spiral base, or is it more like a deeper oval tote with taller sides?  [14:25:18] director: I don't understand what you mean by spiral base  [14:25:24] matcher: For basket #5: is it very shallow like a flat serving tray (the bottom weave makes ring-like circles), or does it have taller sides like a small tote? And is it one single arched handle, or two small side handles?  [14:25:42] director: Lower sides, it's a shallow basket  [14:25:48] matcher: Placing the shallow oval tray-style basket with the braided-looking single handle into position 5. Quick confirm: is it the one where the base weave shows obvious circular rings, rather than a deeper oval tote? If yes, please describe basket #6.  [14:26:03] director: One single arched handle  [14:26:09] matcher: Got it—position 5 is the shallow oval basket with one single arched handle. Can you describe basket #6 (shape, handle type, and any distinctive pattern/colors or lid) so I can pick the right one?  [14:26:23] director: Basket 6 is the front facing rabbit  [14:26:29] matcher: Placing the front-facing rabbit basket into position 6. Just to confirm: it’s the round bunny face looking straight at you with both eyes visible (not the side-profile lidded rabbit), right? Please describe basket #7 next.  [14:27:14] director: basket seven is a rectangle, two tone basket with mostly dark brown with British tan rim, base and handle.  [14:27:20] matcher: I think I found basket 7: the rectangular open-top tote with a mostly dark woven body and a tan rim/base/handle. Does it have a single tall arched handle and no lid?  [14:27:28] director: Yes  [14:28:11] director: Are you ready for basket 8  [14:28:17] matcher: Yes—I've placed the rectangular two-tone tote (dark body with tan rim/base and one tall arched handle) into position 7. Quick confirm: the dark weave is kind of greenish-dark/charcoal and the tan handle/rim is smooth (not braided), right? And yes, ready for basket 8.  [14:29:42] director: Correct. Basket 8 is circular two-tone with a thicker sticks weaving. It's darker brown with beige base and beige rim with a thicker single handle with two nubs at the base of each handle  [14:30:33] director: Got it?  [14:30:43] matcher: Yes, I’ve got a match for basket 8: the round two-tone basket with chunky weave, a light beige base/rim, and a thicker single handle that has two little nubs where it attaches. Is it fairly deep and rounded (not shallow), with no liner/straps—just that chunky weave? If so I’ll lock it in and we can go to basket 9.  [14:31:06] director: Great  [14:31:13] matcher: Yep—I've placed the round chunky two-tone basket with the beige base/rim and the thick handle with two nubs into position 8. Please describe basket 9—does it have a lid or is it open, and what shape/handle?  [14:31:14] director: You got it  [14:31:21] matcher: Yep—I've placed the round chunky two-tone basket with the beige base/rim and the thick handle with two little nubs into position 8. Please describe basket 9—does it have a lid or is it open, and what shape/handle?  [14:31:41] director: Basket 9 is a large, cylinder with two small handles and would make a great hamper  [14:31:48] matcher: I think I found basket 9: the tall cylindrical hamper-style basket with two small side handles near the top. Can you confirm it’s the tall straight-sided cylinder (not the shorter, wider open tub with bigger side handles)?  [14:32:09] director: Basket 9 has no lid  [14:32:18] matcher: Placing the tall cylindrical hamper-style basket with two small side handles and no lid into position 10. Just to confirm: it’s the tall straight-sided cylinder (not the shorter, wider tub with bigger side handles), right? What’s basket #10 like?  [14:32:43] director: deep cylinder type hamper  [14:32:49] matcher: For position 9, I think it’s the tall straight-sided cylindrical hamper with two small loop handles near the top and no lid. Can you confirm it’s the tall cylinder (not the shorter, wider open tub with chunkier side handles)?  [14:32:50] director: Yes it is  [14:32:58] matcher: Great—placing the tall cylindrical hamper (open top, two small loop handles near the rim) into position 9. Just to confirm: the handles are small loops near the rim (not thick cutout grips), and the weave is fairly tight/vertical? Now please describe basket #10.  [14:34:02] director: Basket 10 is very shallow, round with a large smooth beige handle  [14:34:09] matcher: For position 10, I think it’s the very shallow round basket with the big smooth light-beige handle. Is it mostly light/beige overall (not the darker shallow oval tray), with a single arch handle attached at two points on the rim?  [14:34:29] director: Yes, excellent  [14:34:35] matcher: Placing the very shallow round basket with the big smooth pale/beige handle into position 10. Just to confirm: it’s the shallow ROUND one with the tall pale handle (not the shallow OVAL tray-style basket), right? Please describe basket #11.  [14:35:35] director: Basket 11 is a shorter tub-styled with two thicker handles on each side  [14:35:42] matcher: For basket 11, I see a short tub/bucket-shaped basket with two thick side handles. Are those handles thick integrated loop/cut-out style, and is the basket a darker brown overall (not the lighter tan tub, and not the small dark basket with a single arch handle)?  [14:36:04] director: Yes  [14:36:11] matcher: Placing the short tub/bucket-style basket with two thick side handles into position 11. Quick confirm: it’s the darker brown tub with the chunkier side handles (not the lighter tan tub), right? What’s basket #12?  [14:36:26] director: Correct!  [14:36:32] matcher: Great—position 11 is set. Can you describe basket #12: shape (round/oval/rectangular), is it lidded or open, and what kind of handle(s) it has?  [14:38:44] director: Okay?  [14:38:50] matcher: Ready for basket #12—can you describe it: shape (round/oval/rectangular), open or lidded, and what kind of handle(s) it has?  [14:40:25] director: Oval large, no lid and one large arching handle. sweeping curved rim  [14:40:33] matcher: Placing the large open oval tote with a single big arched handle and a smoothly curving rim into position 12. Quick confirm: it’s mostly uniform light tan and fairly deep (not a shallow oval tray and not the white/tan one with strap-like accents), right?
